backend/ledger.mo: Implements a simple token ledger with mint, transfer, and balance lookup using OrderedMap.
backend/main.mo: Defines the main canister actor handling access control, user profiles, articles, comments, likes, and ledger state management.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping Markdown‑related features to affected frontend files and components.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Prewritten summaries describing functionality of various frontend components, hooks, styles, and utilities.
frontend/index.html: Basic HTML entry point loading the React app and setting the site metadata and root container.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React app with custom routing, authentication, profile loading, and centralized route parsing logic.
frontend/src/components/article/ArticleC: Renders an article card with support for author info, approval status, edit/read actions, and delete/approval operations using query hooks.
frontend/src/components/article/ArticleL: Empty file or placeholder with no implemented content.
frontend/src/components/ArticleEditor.ts: React component for creating and editing articles with markdown editing, categories, review toggle, and code block insertion.
frontend/src/components/ArticleList.tsx: Renders a sorted list of articles or articles-with-status and displays placeholders when empty.
frontend/src/components/ArticleReader.ts: Fetches and displays a single article with visibility checks, markdown rendering, and navigation controls.
frontend/src/components/BlogCustomizatio: Provides UI for customizing blog theme, fonts, backgrounds, and accent colors with live preview and saving.
frontend/src/components/BlogDashboard.ts: Loads and displays approved community articles with category navigation and article reading support.
frontend/src/components/CartoonAnimation: Creates floating animated emoji elements using timed updates for a decorative background effect.
frontend/src/components/CategoryPage.tsx: Shows category details, lists relevant articles, and handles navigation for category-based browsing.
frontend/src/components/comments/Comment: Provides a form to submit new comments, handling text input, validation, submission, and cancel/reset actions.
Displays a comment with author info, replies, deletion handling, and nested reply threads up to a max depth.
frontend/src/components/comments/ReplyFo: Form component for submitting replies to a specific parent comment with validation and success handling.
frontend/src/components/CommentSection.t: Renders a full comment section with authentication checks, nested comment counting, a comment form, and a comments list.
frontend/src/components/CommunityCategor: Displays navigable community category cards with optional logging and filtering of hidden categories.
frontend/src/components/crypto/ChartCanv: Draws a high‑DPI price chart on a canvas with grid lines, scaling, panning, hover support, and error/loading states.
frontend/src/components/crypto/ChartInte: Handles mouse interactions for the chart, including hover detection, panning, and passing event handlers to children.
frontend/src/components/crypto/ChartRend: Canvas-based crypto price chart renderer handling DPI scaling, panning, gradients, and grid drawing with error fallback.
frontend/src/components/crypto/ChartStat: Displays chart cache status and provides a tooltip showing hovered price and timestamp.
frontend/src/components/crypto/Cryptocur: Renders an empty-state message explaining missing or unconfigured trading pairs.
Header displaying last update time and refresh control for cryptocurrency configuration and price data.
Displays a single cryptocurrency row with symbol, formatted price, and 24h change for list views.
Initializes and displays a list of enabled trading pairs, fetches current prices from CoinGecko, and manages loading, errors, and refresh states.
frontend/src/components/crypto/CryptoPri: Main chart wrapper managing data fetching, interactions, offsets, and rendering state across multiple subcomponents.
Shows current crypto price, change, and cache status with refresh controls and formatted output.
frontend/src/components/crypto/DataProce: Provides utility functions for formatting prices, validating data, calculating price changes, and symbol-specific config; includes a simple React wrapper.
frontend/src/components/crypto/ErrorHand: Handles display of error and loading states for price data, showing inline or full-screen messages and providing retry support.
frontend/src/components/crypto/PriceData: Fetches price and chart data for a selected trading pair with cache-first logic, validation, strict symbol isolation, and reports results via callback.
frontend/src/components/crypto/PriceHead: Displays current price, 30‑day change, cache status, and a refresh button for the selected trading pair using formatted data.
frontend/src/components/CryptocurrencyLi: Fetches backend-enabled trading pairs and retrieves current prices and historical data from CoinGecko to display a cryptocurrency list.
frontend/src/components/CryptoPriceChart: Manages fetching, rendering, and interacting with crypto price chart data including tooltips, panning, and refresh logic.
frontend/src/components/CryptoTrendsComm: Empty component file with no implemented content.
frontend/src/components/CustomizationPro: Provides a React context for blog customization settings and actions using the useCustomization hook.
frontend/src/components/DeleteConfirmati: Shows a styled modal prompting the user to confirm or cancel deletion of an article with animated UI elements.
frontend/src/components/editor/CategoryS: Renders selectable category tags and handles toggling multiple categories for an editor form.
frontend/src/components/editor/EditorFor: Provides a reusable form layout for creating or editing content with title input, content slot, submit handling, and loading states.
frontend/src/components/editor/EditorHea: Displays the editor header with navigation, editing/creating labels, and a toggle between preview and edit modes.
frontend/src/components/editor/MarkdownE: Provides a textarea-based Markdown editor with styling and change handlers.
frontend/src/components/editor/MarkdownP: Renders parsed Markdown content or a placeholder when empty.
frontend/src/components/editor/MarkdownT: Displays toolbar buttons for inserting common Markdown syntax and code blocks.
frontend/src/components/editor/ReviewTog: Toggles article review status between private and submitted-for-review modes.
frontend/src/components/GameDisplayModal: Empty component file with no implemented content.
frontend/src/components/GameModDetailPag: Displays a game-mod detail view with edit capabilities, handling form state, image upload, and update mutations.
frontend/src/components/GameModPage.tsx: Lists all game mods, supports navigating to details, and allows superusers to add new mods with image upload.
frontend/src/components/GoldExchangePage: Allows players to convert gold to ICP, showing balance, rate, history, and handling validation and exchange mutations.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Renders the site header with navigation, user controls, and routes to profile, leaderboard, customization, management, and game mod pages.
frontend/src/components/landminer/GameAu: Shows a login-required screen for the Landminer game with navigation back.
frontend/src/components/landminer/GameCo: Displays game server connection errors with retry and back options.
frontend/src/components/landminer/GameLo: Shows a loading screen while connecting to the Landminer game server.
frontend/src/components/landminer/GameSt: Displays global Landminer game statistics with loading and empty states.
frontend/src/components/landminer/GameWe: Introduces the Landminer game with rules, mechanics, and example outcomes.
frontend/src/components/landminer/LandMa: Renders a 40x25 land grid with clickable cells, visual states, and optional mining lock logic using backend-controlled logging.
frontend/src/components/landminer/LandMi: Main game container handling data loading, mining actions, state management, and backend connection checks for the land-mining game.
frontend/src/components/landminer/Mining: Displays selected land details and provides occupy, mine, and revive actions with UI feedback and error handling.
Popup modal showing mining results with animations, icons, and messages, including gold celebration effects.
frontend/src/components/landminer/Unifie: Consolidated game status panel showing player stats, gold updates, and providing mine and revive actions with real-time logging.
frontend/src/components/landminer/UserGa: Displays the user's mining game status with loading, empty, alive/dead, and mining state handling, including a revive action.
frontend/src/components/LandMinerGamePag: Main LandMiner game interface managing lands, mining actions, user state, gold updates, and backend connectivity.
Displays the mining leaderboard with rankings, icons, and navigation back to home.
frontend/src/components/LikeButton.tsx: Like button component that fetches like status, toggles like/unlike actions, and displays count and UI states.
frontend/src/components/LoginButton.tsx: Login button triggering Internet Identity login and showing loading state.
frontend/src/components/management/Acces: Shows an access‑denied message with an option to return to the home page.
frontend/src/components/management/Artic: Fetches and filters articles by review status and displays loading, empty, or list views for management.
frontend/src/components/management/LandM: Provides UI to view, edit, auto‑balance, validate, and save mining probability and logging settings.
frontend/src/components/management/Manag: Renders the admin console header with back navigation and super‑admin status info.
Main management dashboard that checks permissions and switches between article, trading, and mining config tools.
Renders tab controls for switching between review queues and management sections.
frontend/src/components/management/Tradi: Modal form component for adding or editing a trading pair using mutation hooks and simple validation.
Displays, adds, edits, toggles, and deletes trading pairs, with a table view and controls to open the edit form.
frontend/src/components/ManagementSystem: Admin management page controlling article review tabs, navigation, and superuser-only tools.
frontend/src/components/NavigationDropdo: User navigation dropdown with logout handling, outside-click detection, and route shortcuts.
frontend/src/components/ProfilePage.tsx: User profile page for viewing info, editing profile, and managing authored articles.
frontend/src/components/ThemeProvider.ts: Applies customization settings to global CSS variables for theming and layout.
frontend/src/components/UserInfoEditModa: Modal for editing and saving a user's profile name.
frontend/src/components/UserProfileSetup: Initial setup form allowing users to enter and save their display name.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and manages the backend actor based on the user's identity and refreshes dependent queries when it changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useApprovalQueries.ts: Provides mutations for approving or rejecting articles with super‑user checks and automatic query invalidation.
frontend/src/hooks/useArticleQueries.ts: Defines queries for fetching user articles, single articles, all articles, and pending articles with backend logging support.
frontend/src/hooks/useCommentQueries.ts: Fetches and structures article comments into a hierarchy, and provides mutations for creating comments and replies.
frontend/src/hooks/useCustomization.ts: Manages per-user blog customization using localStorage, providing load, save, update, and reset helpers tied to Internet Identity.
frontend/src/hooks/useGameModQueries.ts: Provides React Query hooks to fetch, add, and update game mods through a backend actor with cache invalidation.
frontend/src/hooks/useGoldExchangeQuerie: Implements React Query hooks for exchange rate, exchange history, and gold‑to‑ICP transactions using mock data until backend is ready.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Defines an Internet Identity context and provider handling AuthClient setup, login/logout, stored identity loading, and status flags.
frontend/src/hooks/useLandMinerQueries.t: Implements Land‑Miner game queries including lands, user state, and mining logic with backend calls and mock fallbacks.
frontend/src/hooks/useLikeQueries.ts: Provides hooks for liking/unliking articles and fetching like counts with automatic cache updates and conditional logging.
frontend/src/hooks/useMiningConfigQuerie: React-query hooks to fetch and set mining probability settings with super‑user permission checks and cached conditional logging.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Central export hub that re-exports all query hooks and shared types for simplified imports.
frontend/src/hooks/useTradingPairQueries: Provides hooks to list, add, and update trading pairs via backend with super‑user checks and conditional logging.
frontend/src/hooks/useUserQueries.ts: User-related hooks for fetching and saving profiles, checking permissions, and retrieving the mining leaderboard.
frontend/src/index.css: Aggregates all modular global styles including colors, layouts, components, and animations.
frontend/src/main.tsx: App entry point initializing React, Internet Identity, React Query, and global styles.
frontend/src/services/coingecko.ts: Comprehensive CoinGecko API service with caching, rate limiting, backend‑driven trading pair configuration, and queued fetching.
frontend/src/styles/animations.css: Defines animation utilities, hover effects, cartoon styling, and custom scrollbar rules.
frontend/src/styles/base.css: Base Tailwind and global theme styles including fonts, backgrounds, variables, and typographic rules.
frontend/src/styles/charts.css: Defines responsive chart container styles and visual status indicators for cached, refreshing, and error states.
frontend/src/styles/colors.css: Provides dark theme and gray palette utility classes for text, background, and border colors.
frontend/src/styles/components.css: Contains component-specific styles for editors, management UI, trading pairs, articles, and comments with responsive adjustments.
frontend/src/styles/forms.css: Adds custom slider thumb and track designs plus mobile-friendly form input and button sizing.
frontend/src/styles/gradients.css: Defines gradient utility classes for dark theme colors with hover variants and background hover effects.
frontend/src/styles/landminer.css: Implements styles and animations for the Land Miner game including grid cells, state colors, and mining effects.
frontend/src/styles/layout.css: Provides layout and spacing utilities, z-index helpers, and extensive mobile and tablet responsive overrides.
frontend/src/styles/markdown.css: Styles for rendering markdown, including headings, paragraphs, code blocks, blockquotes, lists, and responsive mobile adjustments.
frontend/src/styles/mobile.css: Mobile-specific utility styles improving touch targets, layout, dropdowns, modals, charts, and form element sizing.
frontend/src/styles/navigation.css: Navigation and dropdown styles, including mobile dropdown layout, icons, and responsive navbar adjustments.
frontend/src/styles/responsive.css: Responsive utility classes adjusting spacing, typography, grids, and max-width values for mobile and tablet breakpoints.
frontend/src/styles/theme.css: Theme utility classes defining color variables, backgrounds, borders, z-index layers, and dropdown-related styles.
frontend/src/styles/typography.css: Typography utilities for headings, paragraphs, prose formatting, and mobile text sizing.
frontend/src/types/customization.ts: Type definitions and constants for blog customization options like theme colors, fonts, backgrounds, accents, and defaults.
frontend/src/utils/markdown.tsx: Custom React-based markdown parser supporting headers, paragraphs, blockquotes, lists, and fully preserved multi-line code blocks.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind configuration defining dark mode, content paths, custom color tokens, layout settings, animations, and plugin setup.
project_state.json: Project metadata describing current issues and feature requests focused on fixing multi‑line Markdown code block rendering and editing.
unknown.txt: React JSX snippet rendering category selection UI and a publish‑options toggle with dynamic styling based on state.
